message:
feat(tui): add SpringManager for centralized spring animations

Phase 4b SpringManager implementation (br-27cl0):
- AnimatedFloat struct stores spring state with value, velocity, target
- SpringManager tracks keyed animated values (no mutex needed - Bubble Tea is single-threaded)
- SetWithDeadZone suppresses tiny fluctuations to prevent constant animation
- Tick advances all active springs by one frame
- IsAnimating reports if any spring is moving (for tick rate optimization)
- Full test coverage including overshoot verification

Spring parameters:
- FPS(60) for smooth animation
- Configurable stiffness/damping per spring
- Reduced motion respects NTM_REDUCE_MOTION

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
